intro: Building bridges across institutions and disciplines across Europe and beyond.

projects.title: ETH–KSE Tandem Teaching Program
projects.desc: Developing international collaboration in engineering education through joint teaching activities and knowledge exchange between ETH Zurich and Kyiv School of Economics.

projects.title: Teaching Innovation — Emerging Memory Technologies
projects.desc: Integrating cutting-edge research directly into the Emerging Memory Technologies course curriculum, bridging research and academic teaching.

projects.title: Colloidal Nanomaterials for Emerging Memory Devices
projects.desc: Development and investigation of colloidal nanomaterials for next-generation electronic memory and data storage.

projects.title: Nanomaterials for Memory Technologies
projects.desc: Novel nanomaterials for advanced electronic memory technologies combining chemistry, physics, and materials science.

projects.title: Advanced Equipment for Nanomaterials Research
projects.desc: Acquisition of advanced scientific equipment to expand nanomaterials research laboratory capabilities.
